data.title: SPIE's successful SHARE FOR YOU 2025 employee shareholding plan and plan for anti-dilutive share buyback program.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Cergy, SPIE, a prominent European company specializing in energy and communication services, revealed the achievements of its SHARE FOR YOU 2025 initiative aimed at employee shareholding.

data.title: Efficacy of Inluriyo in advancing breast cancer: 11.4-month improvement in OS with monotherapy, 10.9-month median PFS with abemaciclib combo.
data.description: In a study comparing monotherapy with imlunestrant versus endocrine therapy, a significant improvement of 11.4 months in median overall survival (OS) was observed in patients with ESR1-mutated disease. When examining all patients, the combination of imlunestrant and abemaciclib led to a median progression-free survival (PFS) of 10.9 months. Additionally, this combination showed a positive trend towards overall survival.

data.title: FDA approved GSK's drug for Gonorrhoea treatment; 600,000 cases reported in US in 2023. GSK stock rising.
data.description: The FDA has given approval to GSK Plc's supplemental New Drug Application for gepotidacin as an oral treatment for uncomplicated urogenital gonorrhea, a sexually transmitted infection caused by Neisseria gonorrhoeae. In 2023, there were over 600,000 reported cases of gonorrhea in the U.S., with it being the second most commonly reported STI in the country. This approval applies to adult and pediatric patients aged 12 and above, weighing at least 45 kg, with limited or no other treatment options for this type of gonorrhea. GSK stock is currently on the rise following this news. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Magnificent Seven tech stocks dominate U.S. market, Roundhill ETF surged 119%, Goldman sees market growth shift. S&P earnings $305 in 2026 with 12% growth.
data.description: For the past three years, a small group of mega-cap tech companies known as the Magnificent Seven have dominated the U.S. stock market, leading to the belief that without them, the market rally would collapse. The Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF has surged 119% since its launch in October 2023, significantly outperforming the Invesco Equal Weight S&P 500 ETF. Goldman Sachs predicts a subtle shift in market dynamics, indicating that while mega-caps still hold significance, the next phase of market growth may not solely be driven by them. The report forecasts S&P 500 earnings per share of $305 in 2026 with a 12% year-over-year growth, followed by a 10% increase in 2027. The Magnificent Seven are expected to drive nearly half of the S&P 500’s earnings growth, signifying a changing landscape in the market.

data.title: Investors shift from tech to industrials & financials, Dow hits record-high. UNH stock climbs while Dow breaks records without tech assistance. Valuation concerns arise due to AI fatigue. Nvidia shares stumble after SoftBank exits its stake.
data.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average reached a new record high on Friday morning as investors opted for industrials and financial stocks over tech stocks. UNH stock is on the rise. The Dow achieved record highs without support from high-flying AI darlings, as investors leaned towards the reliable blue-chip giants instead. Big Tech, which has been pivotal in driving market gains, might be losing steam due to "AI fatigue" and stretched valuations. Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) shares faced a setback after SoftBank sold its significant stake, indicating a shift in market dynamics. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: M7 World Championship in Indonesia reveals Opening Ceremony, tournament draw, and M7 Pass. Exciting matchups inc. Team Liquid vs Aurora Gaming PH and Selangor Red Giants vs CG Esports. JAKARTA, Indonesia, 12/12/2025.
data.description: The Swiss Stage of the M7 World Championship in Jakarta, Indonesia on December 12, 2025, presents exciting matchups as Team Liquid takes on Aurora Gaming PH in a highly anticipated Filipino clash, and Selangor Red Giants go head-to-head with CG Esports in a Malaysian rivalry. This stage of the tournament features some of the top teams, setting the stage for intense competition.

data.title: Huntington Bank opens branch in South Euclid at 1902 Warrensville Center Road, offering full-service banking.
data.description: A new branch of The Huntington National Bank, located in South Euclid at 1902 Warrensville Center Road, has officially opened on December 12, 2025. This Oakwood Commons Branch is a full-service facility, where clients can now access services through tellers...

data.title: Tropare wins court case against Dun & Bradstreet for breach of contract. New Jersey court grants Tropare's motion.
data.description: Tropare, Inc., a reputable data management solutions provider, has recently revealed that the Superior Court of New Jersey, Essex County (Law Division) has ruled in favor of the company. The court granted Tropare's Motion for Partial Summary Judgment in its legal dispute against Dun & Bradstreet, Inc. This company, previously known as NYSE: DNB and currently under the ownership of Clearlake Capital Group, L.P., is accused of misappropriating Tropare's Confidential information. This significant development occurred on December 9, 2025. Further details on the case can be found on Tropare's official website (https://www.tropare.com/).

data.title: BlueNord in Norway granted 67,452 performance shares as part of Long-Term Incentive Scheme.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, on December 12, 2025, it was announced that BlueNord ASA has implemented its Long-Term Incentive Scheme (LTI). This initiative, introduced on September 19, 2022, has granted an extra 67,452 shares of BlueNord to participants.

data.title: Corporate tax revenue has dropped significantly post-Trump's tax cuts. Economists are optimistic about the benefits.
data.description: Tax revenue from corporations has significantly decreased following the implementation of tax cuts by Republicans earlier this year. Despite the decline in revenue, economists believe that the tax breaks could potentially be beneficial in the long run.

data.title: Multiple companies, including Circle and Ripple, receive OCC approval for banking charters; stablecoin market now at $313B.
data.description: Five stablecoin issuers, including Circle and Ripple, have been granted conditional approval for national banking charters. This development comes as the stablecoin market reaches a value of $313 billion.

data.title: Crypto industry and trade unions in dispute over trillions in retirement funds; relaxing rules may bring capital into crypto.
data.description: Easing restrictions on conventional retirement funds and pension schemes may lead to the influx of trillions of dollars into the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Jiuzi Holdings secures $1 billion for crypto pivot from initial $12 million target, signaling strong investor support.
data.description: Jiuzi Holdings (NASDAQ: JZXN) has received institutional commitments that could increase its private placement financing to $1 billion, a significant development as the company transitions to crypto asset services. Originally aiming to raise $12 million in October, Jiuzi's private placement has now expanded with the new commitments, highlighting substantial investor backing for its shift in focus. Formerly focused on being a new energy vehicle dealer in China, Jiuzi intends to utilize the funds towards developing its crypto-related activities.

data.title: Casinos urged to modernize table game operations to avoid revenue loss due to errors and inefficiencies. Info-Tech Research Group's study highlights risks and benefits of upgrading.
data.description: Recent research from Info-Tech Research Group reveals that casinos are under increasing pressure to enhance efficiency and mitigate operational risks. Manual table game processes are identified as a key vulnerability leading to costly mistakes, disjointed customer experiences, and staffing difficulties. The study emphasizes the need for improvement as organizations navigate these challenges.
